payload.arguments:
{"path": "frontend/Dockerfile", "content": "# Build stage
FROM node:18-alpine as build

WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install

COPY public/ public/
COPY src/ src/
RUN npm run build

# Production stage with nginx
FROM nginx:alpine

COPY --from=build /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html

# Change default nginx port to 3006 internally, but we'll map in docker-compose
EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]"}

payload.name: write
payload.arguments:
{"path": "docker-compose.yml", "content": "version: "3.9"

services:
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    container_name: game1024-backend
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    volumes:
      - ./backend/data:/app/data

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend
    container_name: game1024-frontend
    ports:
      - "3006:80"
    depends_on:
      - backend
    environment:
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8000"}
